objectives.text: Conduct a targeted literature review on ISAC networks, cognitive radars, reinforcement learning, and mathematical optimization methods.

problems.name: Adaptive Coverage
problems.summary: Coverage in cognitive ISAC networks is expected to adapt to dynamic environments, including hotspot coverage, multistatic coverage for moving targets, and adaptive deployment strategies.

provenance.excerpt: P1: Adaptive Coverage

problems.name: Interference Mitigation
problems.summary: Interference mitigation in cognitive ISAC networks is challenging because environments are dynamic, with practical clutter models described as geometry-dependent and highly time-varying.

provenance.excerpt: P2: Interference Mitigation

problems.name: Resource Allocation
problems.summary: Resource allocation in cognitive ISAC networks requires environment-aware and predictive decision-making to dynamically allocate communication, sensing, and computational resources.

provenance.excerpt: P3: Resource Allocation
